title: Blooven Fruit Fly Traps, Double-sided Fungus Gnat Sticky Catcher For Multiple Insects, Plant Fly Control Indoor (Rectangle 6.5 x 9 cm 40 PCS)
bullet_points: Effective Yellow Fruit Fly Traps - A good helper to catch flying pests such as fungus gnats, fruit flies, whiteflies, winged aphids, thrips, mining flies, mourning flies. Non-toxic and odourless. Easy! Safe! Clean

Extra Large Catch Area - Fruit fly traps glued on both sides for early infestation detection and monitoring of a pest infestation with flying insects. Cute patterns do not affect the ornamental nature of plants

Odorless & Tasteless - Simple physical trap. Ideal for indoor use, do not use outdoors to protect beneficial insects such as bees as well as snakes, lizards, and even birds. Watering does not affect the effectiveness of the adhesive

Easy to Use - 20 large yellow stickers, divisible into 40 small ones (6.5 x 9 cm); includes 40 binding wires for hanging and 5 stakes. Simply peel off the white protective paper and slide it into the potting soil of the plant
If you have any questions, please contact us by email. We will promptly answer your questions
